description_long: This cathedral features a grand central golden dome surrounded by several smaller green domes, creating a striking and harmonious skyline. The structure is built with light gray stone walls, accented by arched windows and doorways, and is adorned with classical columns and decorative cornices. The main entrance is marked by a prominent portico with three rounded arches, flanked by smaller domed towers at the corners. The facade is richly ornamented with reliefs and pilasters, while the side elevations reveal additional arched windows and secondary entrances. Two tall bell towers, each topped with a golden dome, rise above the side wings, adding vertical emphasis to the building. The overall design is monumental, with a symmetrical layout and a blend of Byzantine and Neo-Byzantine architectural elements.
description: A monumental cathedral with a central golden dome, multiple green domes, ornate stone facades, and two tall bell towers. The structure features arched windows, decorative columns, and richly detailed entrances.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with three rounded arches, the central golden dome, and symmetrical arrangement of smaller domes and towers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated nave, multiple green domes, and one of the tall bell towers with a golden dome.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded apse, symmetrical arrangement of domes, and the central golden dome dominating the skyline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the second bell tower, side entrances, and the layered arrangement of domes and arches.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The main facade is richly decorated with arches, columns, pilasters, and reliefs, emphasizing symmetry and grandeur. Ornamental cornices and detailed stonework frame the entry and windows.
attribute_entry_portal_design: The main entry portal features three large rounded arches supported by columns, with decorative reliefs and a prominent set of double doors. The design is grand and inviting, framed by intricate stonework.
